description: Declarative skill chains — ordered, named pipelines that capture the skill-registry 'multi-skill scenarios' as runnable sequences. Single source for: workflow commands, the routing reminder hooks, and the eventual skill planner. agent-os/evals/check.ts asserts every step (and optional step) references a real skill directory; triggers are kept consistent with agent-os/docs/skill-triggers.md. Steps run in order; each step is an existing skill invoked by name.

page-change.description: Adding or changing a page / route island end-to-end.

component-promotion.description: Promoting a page-local component up the ladder into shared / family-shared.

resource-crud.description: Scaffolding a backend resource UI — list page plus URL-driven create/edit dialogs.

ui-review.description: Building or restyling UI — craft, accessibility, and motion review.

form-mutation.description: Building a form that mutates via apiClient and maps server/validation errors.

data-hook.description: Adding a TanStack Query hook / data layer over the fetch client.

styling.description: Styling / theming with semantic tokens and Tailwind.

env-change.description: Adding, renaming, or removing an env var and keeping schema + templates in sync.
